creator: dr.klepp@gmx.at
text:
When pkg installes a packet that requires more than some hundred MB it uses gigabytes to show the required disk space. But when the needed disk space is smaller that 1 gigabyte, it gives 0 gigabyte as space requirement.

Steps to reproduce:

# pkg install racket
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
The following 1 packages will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
	racket: 6.1_2

The process will require 0 GiB more space.
67 MiB to be downloaded.
